drops.title: PUMPR loyal holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Generated from the live holder snapshot immediately before distribution, with duplicate and allocation-total validation.
source.rule: Wallets holding more than 0.5% of the 1,000,000,000 PUMPR supply qualified. Bonding curve, pool, dev, and bundler wallets were excluded. Rewards were weighted by supply share and holding time, with sniper-risk and prior-airdrop adjustments.

notes: Supply threshold: 5,000,000 PUMPR, equal to 0.5% of the 1,000,000,000 token supply.
Weight = holder percentage x holding-time multiplier x sniper-risk multiplier x prior-airdrop multiplier.
Holding-time multipliers: 1.4x at 48+ hours, 1.2x at 24+ hours, 1x at 6+ hours, and 0.75x below 6 hours.
42 recipients received exactly 1,000,000 PUMPR across 7 confirmed Solana transactions.

drops.title: PUMPR live holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Prepared from the live Pump.fun top-holder API with explicit bonding curve, associated curve, pool address, dev wallet, bundler, and below-threshold exclusions.
source.rule: Current live non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR are queued for a 1,000,000 PUMPR weighted airdrop. Transfers are pending broadcast from the airdrop wallet.

notes: Fresh live snapshot generated immediately before send prep.
Bonding curve, associated bonding curve, pool address, dev wallet, bundlers, and below-threshold holders are excluded.
Transfers are pending until the airdrop wallet secret is available to broadcast.
All planned recipients were sent in confirmed Solana batches.
Sender: ER4KEmk3jCeNhfV7hNTNyh2XGNpbE8Pqk9CZsBe2BJiy

drops.title: PUMPR live weighted holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Prepared from Pump.fun holder data, dev-wallet exclusion, Token-2022 account checks, and finalized Solana transfer signatures.
source.rule: Current on-curve non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR received a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool weighted by holder percentage, holding time, previous rewards, and Pump.fun risk flags.

notes: Prepared from a fresh live Pump.fun 0.5%+ holder snapshot immediately before sending.
Dev wallet was excluded before transfer.
Allocations are weighted by live holder percentage, hold time, previous rewards, and Pump.fun risk flags.

source.rule: Current non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR received a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool weighted by holder percentage, holding time, and previous rewards.

notes: Prepared from the latest 0.5%+ Pump.fun holder snapshot before sending.
Dev wallet was excluded before transfer.
Every row is tied to a finalized Solana Token-2022 transfer signature.

drops.title: PUMPR live weighted holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Fresh Pump.fun 0.5%+ holder snapshot, Solana Token-2022 supply check, dev-wallet exclusion, and finalized Solscan transaction proof.
source.rule: Current non-dev Pump.fun holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR received a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool, weighted by holder percentage, holding time, prior rewards, and Pump.fun risk flags.

notes: Prepared from a fresh live Pump.fun 0.5%+ holder snapshot immediately before sending.
Dev wallet was excluded before transfer.
Finalized Solscan proof is attached for every recipient batch.

drops.title: PUMPR live weighted holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Live Pump.fun holder balances, on-curve wallet filtering, dev-wallet exclusion, and finalized Solana transfer signatures.
source.rule: Current on-curve non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR received a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool, weighted by holder percentage, holding time, previous rewards, and Pump.fun risk flags.

notes: Prepared from a fresh live Pump.fun 0.5%+ holder snapshot immediately before sending.
Dev wallet and non-wallet/off-curve accounts are excluded.
Previous airdrops are considered so repeat recipients receive measured top-ups rather than oversized repeats.

drops.title: PUMPR live weighted holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Live Pump.fun balances, on-curve wallet filtering, historical holder snapshots where Pump.fun omitted entry times, and finalized Solscan transaction proof.
source.rule: Current on-curve non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR received a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool, weighted by holder percentage, holding time, prior rewards, and Pump.fun risk flags.

notes: 35 holder times restored from prior snapshots because Pump.fun omitted live entry times.
3 eligible wallets had missing holding time and received the minimum weighting.
2 rows excluded: off-curve/program owner or dev wallet.

source.crossCheck: Live Pump.fun holder feed, Solana Token-2022 account checks, and finalized Solscan transaction proof.
source.rule: Current non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR received a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool, weighted by holder percentage, holding time, prior rewards, and Pump.fun risk flags.

drops.title: PUMPR weighted holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Live Solana Token-2022 holder accounts and finalized Solscan transaction proof.
source.rule: Current non-dev holders with at least 0.5% PUMPR were paid from a 1,000,000 PUMPR pool, weighted by holder percentage and holding time. Previous airdrops were considered so allocations stayed measured.

drops.summary: Paid current 0.5%+ holders from the live Pump.fun holder list. The 1M PUMPR pool was weighted by supply share, holding duration, and previous rewards so long-term holders received more while short-time holders received smaller test-sized drops.

drops.title: PUMPR 1%+ holder loyalty airdrop

source.crossCheck: Pump.fun list refreshed immediately before sending. First batch and all retry batches were verified by signature status polling.
source.rule: Current non-dev holders with at least 1% PUMPR and at least 3 hours holding time; longer holders received larger allocations.

drops.summary: Paid current 1%+ holders from the live Pump.fun holder list. 12h+ holders received 75K, 6h-12h received 50K, and 3h-6h received 25K.

drops.title: PUMPR loyal holder airdrop

source.crossCheck: Live Solana Token-2022 holder accounts and Solscan transaction proof
source.note: Pump.fun excludes the bonding curve from visible holder rank; on-chain rank includes it.

drops.summary: Paid launch-day holders who kept holding at least 1% through the live Solana cross-check.
